body.name: AROS Retail Operations
body.description: Remote MCP server for AROS retail operations intelligence.

tools.name: aros_get_store_summary
tools.description: Read sales, transaction, department, top-mover, and alert summary for scoped AROS stores.

tools.name: aros_get_connector_health
tools.description: Read connector status, last test, last sync, and operator-visible failure details.

tools.name: aros_get_inventory_risks
tools.description: Read low-stock and stockout inventory signals versus configured reorder points for scoped AROS stores. Stores connected through data sources without inventory support are reported as such.

tools.name: aros_get_exception_summary
tools.description: Read void-exception counts and amounts derived from POS invoice data for scoped AROS stores. Refund, no-sale, and per-cashier exception types are not available from currently connected data sources and are reported as unsupported.

tools.name: aros_draft_action
tools.description: Create an approval-ready draft action inside AROS. This never mutates POS systems directly.

body.name: Regulars
body.description: Remote MCP server for read-only Regulars business profiles, catalog search, promotions, hours, and approved links.

tools.name: regulars_get_business_profile
tools.description: Read the business-approved public Regulars profile for a business. This tool is read-only and cannot change business data.

tools.name: aros_customer_search_products
tools.description: Search the public customer catalog for products available at a business location.

tools.name: aros_customer_get_promotions
tools.description: Read public promotions available to customers for a business or store.

tools.name: aros_customer_get_business_hours
tools.description: Read public business hours, pickup windows, delivery options, and store contact details.

tools.name: regulars_get_links
tools.description: Read approved public website, map, social, support, legal, QR/deep link, and assistant install links for a business. This tool is read-only.
